title: doronicum macrophyllum
intro: Doronicum macrophyllum, also known as large-leaved leopard's bane, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Doronicum macrophyllum can be prepared into herbal preparations like infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
